INSULIN_LTCP_COPAY_1M Insulin Copay Long Term Care Pharmacy - 1 month supply NUM 12 - X
1 This file applies only to Part D plans.
2 * indicates length change for the variable; length in the most recent file is displayed. Prior to the May 2018 update the length was 2.
3 Shading or '-' indicates that the variable was not present during this time.
